description_long: This is a metallic combination wrench featuring a closed-loop ring on one end and an open U-shaped jaw on the other. The body is slender and elongated, with a slightly flattened profile and a uniform dark gray finish. The open end is designed for gripping and turning hexagonal nuts or bolts, while the ring end provides a more secure grip for higher torque applications. The surface appears to be matte with minor textural irregularities, suggesting a forged or cast construction. There are faint markings or engravings along the shaft, likely indicating size or manufacturer information. The overall appearance is utilitarian, robust, and suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings.
description: A dark gray metal combination wrench with an open jaw on one end and a closed ring on the other, featuring a matte, slightly textured finish and faint shaft markings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wrench, with both the open jaw and closed ring ends clearly visible.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the thin, flat profile of the wrench and the circular cross-section of the ring end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the open jaw and ring ends with shaft markings faintly visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side of view 1, again emphasizing the slender profile and the open jaw's thickness.
